name: News
description: Latest updates and milestones from Enlite Helicopters.

description: Deep dives into our autonomous flight systems and engineering.

name: Enlite R2
description: Our flagship medium-lift autonomous cargo helicopter designed for long-range logistics. Built to carry substantial payloads over hundreds of kilometers, the R2 ensures rapid and reliable delivery across diverse terrains.

name: Enlite R3
description: A heavy-lift variant optimized for industrial and defense applications, providing unmatched payload capacity and operational endurance.

title: Enlite R2 Completes First Autonomous Cross-Country Flight
excerpt: The Enlite R2 has successfully completed its first fully autonomous flight spanning over 300km, marking a major milestone in UAV logistics.

children.text: We are proud to announce that our flagship R2 model has achieved a new record...

title: Senior Aerospace Engineer
description: We are looking for an experienced Aerospace Engineer to lead the design of our next-generation VTOL systems.

name: Dr. Sarah Chen
bio: Dr. Chen has over 20 years of experience in autonomous systems and previously led UAV development at a major defense contractor.

question: What is the maximum payload of the R2?
answer: The Enlite R2 can carry up to 70kg of cargo in its standard configuration.

name: James Wilson
content: Enlite's autonomous helicopters have revolutionized our remote delivery operations, reducing costs by 40%.

name: Medical Emergency Transport
description: Rapid aerial transport for medical supplies, organs, and emergency equipment to remote locations.

heroDescription: Enlite Helicopters is pioneering the next generation of autonomous VTOL aircraft for cargo, defense, and emergency services.
solutionDescription: Our aircraft bypass traditional infrastructure to deliver payloads faster than ever before.

description: Autonomous VTOL Solutions for the Modern World
